structured_output.root_cause_summary: Flipped the default metastore cache codec from PickleKeyValueCodec to JsonKeyValueCodec. Operators who explicitly configure pickle are unaffected.
structured_output.test_results_summary: Two existing tests assume pickle-serializable objects as cache values. They fail under JSON without also changing the tests; I did not rewrite tests.
structured_output.recommended_follow_up: Audit in-tree callers to confirm JSON-safe values; update tests if acceptable.
